Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: When all aircraft run out of fuel, they will report 'bingo' fuel state and automatically return to base (RTB). Aircraft will also RTB if they run out of ammunition for their primary weapons.

Aircraft which are returning to base are uncontrollable by the player until they land, rearm, and refuel. You can see their rearm/refuel time remaining by opening the Flight Deck control after the aircraft have landed.
Note: you can force any aircraft to RTB at any time by hitting the T key, or by using the right click menu option.
